name: IT+Robotics
description:
IT+Robotics is a manufacturing company specializing in advanced machine vision solutions for industrial automation. Their products and services include 3D vision systems for bin-picking, quality inspection, and logistics automation. They also develop custom machine vision projects tailored to specific client needs, such as metrology and in-line checks. || Company in Vicenza, Italy | IT+Robotics is a manufacturing company that specializes in advanced machine vision solutions for industrial automation. | IT+Robotics is a manufacturing company specializing in advanced machine vision solutions for industrial automation. Their products and services include 3D vision systems for bin-picking, quality inspection, and logistics automation. They also develop custom machine vision projects tailored to specific client needs, such as metrology and in-line checks. | IT+Robotics is an industry leader in advanced 3D vision for robotics and automation. From bin-picking to quality inspection and special custom vision projects, we've been active since 2005. Today, we have a deep understanding and expertise in: • artificial vision systems • visual inspection • vision-guided robotic systems Visit our website for more information about our works and our products | About IT+Robotics is a highly focused company specialized in robot and industrial vision: from bin-picking to quality inspection to custom-made projects related to industrial vision. Additional Information Spin-off company of the University of Padua. • Robotics simulation • Machine vision • Visual Inspection • Vision-guided Robotics | IT+Robotics is a spin-off company of the University of Padua. It was created in 2005 by professors working in the field of robotics and young, brilliant people coming from the Information Engineering Department of the University of Padua. The mission of IT+Robotics is to increase the flexibility of industrial processes by transforming the latest results of the academic research into industrial solutions.
IT+Robotics has a wide expertise in artificial vision systems, in particular applied to machine vision systems for visual inspection, robotics simulation for off-line programming and vision guided robotic systems. IT+Robotics applies a special care in understanding clients' requests and focuses on the simplicity and reliability of its products. IT+Robotics has a strong commitment to research activities: it's involved in four European founded international research projects and three national research projects.

name: Festo
description:
Festo Sdn. Berhad operates as an automation machinery manufacturing company. The company was named after its founders Albert Fezer and Gottlieb Stoll. | Festo is a global player and an independent family-owned company with headquarters in Esslingen am Neckar, Germany. Festo has set standards in industrial automation technology and technical education ever since its establishment, thereby making a contribution to sustainable development of the environment, the economy and society. The company supplies pneumatic and electrical automation technology to 300,000 customers of factory and process automation in over 35 industries. The LifeTech sector with medical technology and laboratory automation is becoming increasingly important. The products and services are available in 176 countries. With about 20,700 employees in over 250 branch offices in 61 countries worldwide, Festo achieved a turnover of around €3.36 billion in 2021. Each year around 7% of this turnover is invested in research and development. In this learning company, 1.5 % of turnover is invested in basic and further training. Festo Didactic SE is a leading provider of technical education and training and offers its customers worldwide comprehensive digital and physical learning solutions in the industrial environment.

name: Proksys
description:
Proksys develops and integrates industrial image processing systems for automated inspection and robotics applications. The company focuses on conception, integration, software development and maintenance of machine vision solutions in manufacturing environments. Its systems combine cameras, optics, lighting and controllers with custom software to capture, analyze and evaluate product features in real time. Proksys delivers applications such as adhesive bead inspection on metal components and 3D vision-guided pick and place for food products. Its solutions support quality assurance, process control and automated handling across various industrial sectors. Proksys also provides interfaces to robot and PLC controllers, parameterizable format changes and process data outputs for traceability and optimization. || Proksys develops and integrates industrial image processing systems for automated inspection and robotics applications. | Proksys develops and integrates industrial image processing systems for automated inspection and robotics applications. name: PlatiScan
description:
PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection. || PlatiScan VI provides automated optical inspection systems for industrial quality control and defect detection. | PlatiScan VI Automated Optical Inspection

Mit PlatiScan VI wurde ein neuartiges optisches Inspektionssystem (engl. visual inspection system) entwickelt.

Das System besteht aus einem handelsüblichen Windows-PC auf dem unsere spezielle Software installiert ist, die zur Auswertung der Bilder dient und die Bilderfassung wird realisiert durch eine herkömmliche Digitalkamera in einer individuell gewünschten Konfiguration als "Standalone" oder "Integrated" System.

Unser PlatiScan VI System wurde der menschlichen Vorgehensweise einer manuellen Sichtprüfung nachgebildet, so kann eine manuelle Sichtprüfung per Computer automatisiert werden. Hierdurch wird die Fehlererkennungsrate und die gesamte Testabdeckung deutlich erhöht.

Unter anderem sind bereits heute folgende Applikationen realisiert worden:

    * Board-Check
    * LED-Check
    * Display-Check
    * Jet-Test

Natürlich sind mit dem PlatiScan VI System auch andere Anwendungsgebiete möglich.
Sprechen Sie uns doch einfach heute noch an und lassen Sie sich über die Lösung Ihrer individuellen Testbedürfnisse beraten.

name: CamCom
description:
CamCom is an award-winning, industry agnostic AI powered platform for visual inspections built on a computer vision stack. We are pioneers in leveraging CV and associated technologies in the visual inspection process. We deploy our solutions through bespoke Rigs, mobile devices or UAVs depending on the customer requirements for precision and speed. We work closely with our customers to enable retrofit solutions that do not require too many changes to the existing workflow. Defect/damage visual inspections are labour intensive and therefore subjective, slow, and prone to error. We eliminate subjectivity, future proof the process and make sure that the current throughput is not affected in any way. Our solution is the ultimate control tower that enables creation of a visual track and trace audit trail across the life cycle of the product. Our solutions increase efficiencies and offer non-linear scalability. We ensure contactless solutions that enable our partners to have business continuity. Our current operations are in India, Middle East, and Southeast Asia. We plan to expand into other regions very soon and position ourselves as the quality inspection partner of choice for enterprises across the world by future proofing their processes. We are headquartered in Bangalore, INDIA and have an office in Dubai, UAE. Die Neugier steht immer an erster Stelle - Wir haben den Ehrgeiz, für unsere Kunden die beste Lösung zu finden. Dies erreichen wir durch Erfahrung, Professionalität und unser kreatives Potential. Mit Intelligenz, Leidenschaft und Teamgeist begleiten wir unsere Projekte zum Erfolg.

Meilensteine sind für uns Trophäen - Als externe Partner nutzen wir bewusst kreative Spielräume und erarbeiten daraus neue Produktlösungen. Unsere umfassende Erfahrung und das fach-spezifische Wissen unserer Kunden bilden so einen einzigartigen Brainpool.

Wir unterstützen Unternehmen projektbezogen bei der Optimierung stra-tegischer Fragestellungen. Damit die Konzepte und Ideen auch greifbar werden, begleiten wir unsere Kunden von der Konzeptarbeit über die Ent-wicklung bis hin zur Serienreife von Produkten.

Ihr Partner für die Projektanalyse und -umsetzung
Jedes Projektengagement von ADS Engineering wird durch die Bedürfnisse der Kunden definiert. Sie wählen aus unserem reichhaltigen Fundus von Fachwissen und Erfahrung gezielt die benötigten Kompetenzen. Dabei le-gen wir höchsten Wert auf Qualität und Effizienz.

Sicherheit im Entscheidungsprozess - Unsere langjährigen Erfahrungen aus dem Umfeld der Medizinaltechnik, Life Sciences und dem klassischen Maschinenbau werden durch ein breites Technologienetzwerk ergänzt.

In der Photovoltaik-Branche ist pi4_robotics wegweisend mit Qualitätsprüfsystemen auf Basis der Elektrolumineszenz-Technologie. pi4_robotics ist der Erfinder des Produktidentifikationssystems PV-IDent. Dabei werden auf Basis von Elektrolumineszenz-Bildern von Solarmodulen inhärente Produktmerkmale ermittelt, die zur Wiedererkennung verwendet werden. PV-IDent ist ein eingetragenes Markenzeichen der pi4_robotics GmbH. pi4_robotics GmbH ist in der Öffentlichkeit auch durch den im Jahr 2010 erstmals vorgestellten pi4_workerbot bekannt geworden. In the photovoltaic industry pi4_robotics is leading the way with its quality inspection systems based on electroluminescent technology. pi4_robotics invented the product identification system PV-Ident. On the basis of electroluminescence images of solar panels, this system detects inherent product characteristics and uses them for product recognition. PV-Ident is a registered trademark of pi4_robotics GmbH. name: Sweeper
description: SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. Until now this has never been achieved and it will ensure Europe’s leading role in agricultural robotics.  In modern greenhouses there is a high demand to automate labour. The availability of a skilled workforce that accepts repetitive tasks in the harsh climate conditions of a greenhouse is decreasing rapidly. The current state of the art in automated harvesting of fruits and vegetables has remained remarkably stationary in the past decades. In the EU-FP7-project CROPS (www.crops-robots.eu) extensive research has been performed on agricultural robotics. One of the applications was a sweet pepper harvesting robot. SWEEPER will use the technology developed in CROPS to introduce, test and validate a robotic harvesting solution for sweet pepper under real-world conditions.  The project involves 6 partners from 4 different countries (The Netherlands, Belgium, Sweden and Israel). The consortium consist out of fundamental and applied research organisations, a system integrator and a modern grower of sweet pepper. In the consortium a wide-range of disciplines are available, including: horticulture, horticultural engineering, machine vision, sensing, robotics, control, intelligent systems, software architecture, system integration and greenhouse crop management. || SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. | SWEEPER’s main objective is to put the first generation greenhouse harvesting robots onto the market. name: PackCheck
description:
We are the specialists in visual inspection and identification solutions. As a reliable and enthusiastic partner, we provide turn-key solutions tailored to your specific requirements and wishes. As an integrator, we strive to implement the best-suited solution within your existing production and packaging processes. We collaborate with you as a manufacturer or OEM, aiming for a long-term partnership for the future.

We view quality assurance as “continuous improvement,” keeping it in focus and helping to further develop it within organizations.

Our ViTrack software provides full insight into inspection data and tracks all completed inspection points. Our proprietary software is fully developed in-house and is 100% suitable for industrial production processes.

description:

We're hiring! https://fizyr.com/careers/ | Computer vision software- with native artificial intelligence and machine learning - built for picking & stacking items, parcels, depalletizing and trailer unloading. Fizyr designs, builds, installs, and maintains an unmatched vision software product for automated picking & stacking items, parcels, depalletizing, and trailer unloading. Our deep learning algorithms are used to enable automated handling of unknown objects varying in shape, size, color, material, and stacking, being picked from (conveyed) bulk. Fizyr’s product is applied in production all over the world by leading system integrators and end-users, in online retail, warehousing and parcel services.  

We started in 2014 as ‘Delft Robotics’, a TU Delft spin-off founded by Professor Martijn Wisse, as a system integrator building robotic picking cells. In 2016, we participated in and won both competitions of the Amazon Picking challenge, mainly due to our track record in applying deep learning. This led to the company pivoting towards a deep learning computer vision software-only product and re-branding to Fizyr in 2017.  

Our Plug-and-Play modular product allows for a smooth integration with any system. We give integrators the freedom to choose the best hardware for their picking cell and we help them configure it, while facilitating cost, robustness, and speed optimization. Our algorithms provide over 100 grasp poses each second, including classification to handle objects differently, but also perform quality controls and detect defects to prevent damaged items from being placed on a sorter.  

Leading integrators across the globe acknowledged our product’s high quality and used it in production. This is what makes us truly unique; we were trusted as a strategic partner and grew successfully bootstrapped since the beginning. Up to this day, we remain dedicated to creating true value for our partners, so that they can create cutting-edge logistics solutions for their clients.

name: VH Technology
description:
VH Technology s.r.l. develops Computer Vision solutions for businesses, aimed at enhancing the efficiency of manufacturing processes and logistics.   Computer Vision technologies enable machines to understand images and videos, as a human would do. This is particularly useful for automating some repetitive tasks which today are performed by humans, such as quality control in the assembly line. They use these and other technologies to develop industrial machines which are able to perform complex product/parts inspection tasks.   VH Technology recently created an innovative system for managing articles stocked in warehouses without the need of barcode. They developed a machine capable of recognising the products entering or leaving the warehouse simply by scanning their label. The same way a human would do. This product, which is patent pending, is particularly useful when the use of barcode is not possible or too complex (e.g. cellar management). || VH Technology s.r.l. develops Computer Vision solutions for businesses, aimed at enhancing the efficiency of manufacturing processes. | VH Technology s.r.l. develops Computer Vision solutions for businesses, aimed at enhancing the efficiency of manufacturing processes and logistics. name: xis.ai
description:
xis.ai specializes in automating visual quality inspection and process monitoring for industrial applications using artificial intelligence and robotics. Our primary focus is on revolutionizing industrial quality inspection through advanced computer vision technology.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of software and hardware solutions designed to streamline the development and deployment of AI-powered visual inspection systems:

1. Software:
   - xis dev: A no-code platform that allows non-technical users to develop computer vision models without coding knowledge. It includes features like AI-assisted labelling, model training, and performance analytics.
   - xis Runtime: A lightweight platform for deploying computer vision models in production environments, offering real-time analytics and integration with various industrial cameras and sensors.

2. Hardware:
   - Edge AI: Deployment of AI algorithms directly on edge devices like cameras or sensors for real-time analysis and faster decision-making.
   - Support for various visual sensors: Industrial cameras, microscopes, thermal cameras, and X-ray tubes.

xis.ai's platform is designed to be user-friendly, enabling non-technical industrial professionals to develop and implement AI-based visual inspection solutions quickly and efficiently. This approach aims to make advanced quality control technologies more accessible to various industries and applications. || xis.ai specializes in automating visual quality inspection and process monitoring for industrial applications using artificial intelligence and robotics. name: SmartRay
description:
Their strategy is to create a unique range of 3D Sensors that solve more applications in more industries than any other company. 3D Sensors that are easier and faster to deploy, that operate more consistently and reliably once installed and that are economical, compact and light in weight. 3D Sensors that offer the best inspection, guidance and measurement solutions for manufacturers, machine builders and system integrators around the world. || SmartRay specializes in 3D sensors for measurement, quality inspection and robot guidance. | Their strategy is to create a unique range of 3D Sensors that solve more applications in more industries than any other company. 3D Sensors that are easier and faster to deploy, that operate more consistently and reliably once installed and that are economical, compact and light in weight. 3D Sensors that offer the best inspection, guidance and measurement solutions for manufacturers, machine builders and system integrators around the world. | SmartRay is a privately owned  high-tech company with headquarters in Wolfratshausen near Munich and several branches worldwide. The company focuses on metrology grade inspection delivered through 3D laser triangulation sensors. By providing global manufacturers with solutions that improve their product quality, SmartRay optimizes their processes, and reduce their production costs. SmartRay is split into two successful business units: Sensor technology: ECCO sensors, and JOSY the complete solution for weld seam inspection.

The leading-edge ECCO sensors provide highly precise 3D laser measurement, repeatable inspection data, creating detailed 3D images. With  precise sensors, SmartRay helps well-known companies worldwide with process optimization and automated measurement tasks.

These first-class sensors and the associated software forms the core of JOSY – an all-in-one turnkey solution for non-contact visual 3D inspections. SmartRay is the global market leader in high end weld seam inspection. Large manufacturers, especially the leading automotive companies, rely on SmartRay’s expertise.

For more details, visit SmartRay at www.smartray.com | SmartRay specialise in 3D sensors* for inspection, guidance and measurement; that help manufacturing companies improve product quality, guide automation and reduce production costs. By focusing on 3D, SmartRay has built a comprehensive portfolio of products designed to solve a rapidly increasing range of industrial applications. The company’s strategy is to combine new technologies with German engineering to create a range of 3D sensors that can be fitted anywhere, are quick to set up and easy to deploy. 

SmartRay sensors combine laser triangulation with innovative image formation technology to create detailed 3D images that can be processed by any 3rd party vision software. The latest ECCOTM family brings a new design philosophy to the 3D sensor market that delivers high performance, small size, lightweight and stylish packaging. SmartRay 3D technology also forms the core of the WeldVisionTM high speed inline weld inspection systems, employed by major automotive manufacturers to verify weld seam quality.

Based in Munich area, Germany, the company’s global coverage is expanding rapidly through a network of distributors and system integrators.  For more details, visit SmartRay at www.smartray.de 

(* 3D sensors may also be referred to as a 3D laser scanner, 3D laser sensor, 3D vision sensor, laser profiler, laser profile sensor or simply 3D vision) | Lösungen im Bereich der Industriellen Bildverarbeitung mit den Schwerpunkten Hochgeschwindigkeits 3D-Messtechnik und Hochgeschwindigkeits 3D Sensorik

description: Stuttgart I Wolfsburg I Detroit I Tuscaloosa I Bratislava I Pilsen 3D-CT Computed Tomography I Industrial X-ray, 3D-Measurement, 3D-Scan I NDT services I Industrial 2/2.5D X-ray analysis I Ultrasonic Testing I PolyCT I In-Line-Inspection Facilities & Special Machine Engineering I AI Software Development XRAY-LAB provides non destructive testing, X ray and computed tomography (CT) analysis as a service and the development of fully automated in line inspection systems as well as special engineering for in line CT scanners of the highest standards. For almost 20 years, the company has specialized in the use of various techniques for a broad range of industrial components. Our services include 2D, 2.5D and 3D (CT) X-Ray techniques, 3D laser scanning, ultrasonic and eddy current testing or dye penetrant inspection. Especially X-ray computed tomography (CT) has been established as an inspection technique in a broad range of industry branches. The ability of a non-destructive inspection tremendously supports the quality of solid materials or industrial products, for instance, automotive parts, by providing comprehensive information about shape, dimensions, volumes, internal defects or the spatial distribution of inclusions or voids in 3D. Apart from its non-destructive nature, CT has emerged as a very fast and efficient technique, which can be even attached to in-line manufacturing or testing. name: SR Control
description:
SR Control provides quality assurance and inspection services for precision parts and assemblies. The company offers dimensional measurement using computed tomography and 3D coordinate measuring machines, as well as contour analyses with surface measuring equipment. Its services include initial sample inspection reports, laser engraving and marking, and visual surface inspection using magnifiers or microscopes. SR Control also performs deburring, rework, and cleaning of various components. In addition, the company handles assembly and final inspection of assemblies and individual parts, as well as sorting and packaging tasks. It conducts 100 percent manual inspection of precision parts based on defined defect criteria for industrial customers. || Unser Unternehmen steht seit 2005 für Qualitätskontrolle auf höchstem Niveau. name: Supratec Engineering
description:
SUPRATEC Engineering is the flagship brand for engineering at SUPRATEC*.

It gathers under a single banner the activities SUPRATEC Lormac (design and production of assembly equipment and specific tools), SUPRATEC Synergies (design and development of technological disruptions) and SUPRATEC Evo (adaptive processes and hi-tech systems for automation and control purposes).

This is achieved by the creation of the eFactory® portfolio: Library of integrated and connected technology lines for the continuous improvement of the Industry 4.0 production processes. In the Preparation, Handling, Assembly and Control of parts phase, our technologies are adapted to the entire industrial manufacturing chain. Expertise includes adaptive dispensing of complex materials, adaptive polishing, autonomous handling of heavy loads, ergonomic positioning, bin picking of components, precision clamping, automatic screwing, press-fitting assembly, confocal measurement, 2D/3D vision inspection, and so on.

Our Ile-de-France (Bondoufle, Design Office), Rhône-Alpes (Lyon, Industrial IT) and Lorraine (Tucquegnieux, Design Office and Production Unit) locations facilitate local exchanges with the French industrial network. 

By combining industrial, IT and technological resources, our multidisciplinary teams put their know-how at the service of the aeronautics, automotive, space, defence, rail, naval and construction sectors... We offer our customers high value-added solutions adapted to their challenges in improving their manufacturing performance. Our range of services covers the design and assembly of cutting-edge technologies, the industrialization of new products, the integration of \'turnkey\'​ solutions including delivery, installation and maintenance on site.

name: SYTEC
description:
Sytec Group offers turnkey solutions for industrial automation, assembly machines, test benches and software applications, highly integrated with production processes.


AUTOMATIC ASSEMBLY STATIONS AND LINES

- Components assembly lines made according to customer needs and product characteristics
- Process flow completely controlled with SyWorkflow software, ensuring the quality of the goods
- Evaluation of the necessary automation carried out in collaboration with the customer, to ensure the right balance between efficiency and costs

BENCHES AND TESTING EQUIPMENTS

- Realization of automatic testing systems, end of line or integrated into the production process
- Strong specific experiences for different kinds of products, tested with SyTest software, developed to ensure whole control of the test sequence to the customer

TOTAL INTEGRATION WITH COMPANY ERP / MES 

- Availability of data collected from assembly lines or test benches within the customer management systems

The company focuses on NIR spectrometers, including the Spektralwerk Core series for inline inspection, identification, and content analysis in process environments. It offers application software such as Spectrotron and APIs for configuring and operating its spectrometers. Silicann Systems provides engineering services covering custom optical sensor and light source design, spectrometric calibration models, and algorithm development. Its electronics services include circuit and PCB design, firmware and embedded Linux development, interface integration, and prototyping through to small-series production. name: ANGARA Technology
description: ANGARA TECHNOLOGY develops automated control and measurement systems from prototype to dedicated turnkey installations. The company designs custom software and interfaces for control, test, and measurement systems, including embedded and optical inspection setups. It offers consulting for LabVIEW and PLC-based instrumentation projects, covering data acquisition, signal processing, automation, and embedded system design. ANGARA TECHNOLOGY also provides coaching and training in LabVIEW, TwinCAT3, and related real-time and FPGA tools for engineers and industry professionals. Its projects include test benches, mobile flow regulation rigs, beam diagnostics, ventilator control, and temperature monitoring systems for research and industrial clients. || ANGARA TECHNOLOGY develops automated control and measurement systems, turnkey solutions, and LabVIEW consulting and training for industry. | ANGARA TECHNOLOGY develops automated control and measurement systems from prototype to dedicated turnkey installations. name: Demcon industrial systems
description:
Demcon industrial systems is your partner for production technology. As part of the Demcon group, we develop, create and support technical solutions for the manufacturing industry. Our solutions are modular, scalable and based on state-of-the-art industry standards in combination with innovative concepts. These may range from sub-modules to complete turnkey production lines and include functions like high precision product assembly and quality inspection with industrial vision cameras and algorithms. Together with selected partners and our customers, we define a tailored vision on the theme “Smart Industry” and turn this into tangible technology for your business. Our own motion controller, complete with drives and software, enables us to respond to your positioning challenges with strong and reliable answers.

Demcon industrial systems is an independent part of the Demcon group, consisting of three operating companies with around 60 employees and serving the industrial market. The Demcon Group has access to many (>500) engineering specialists in different disciplines. We like to take on difficult challenges which cannot be solved straight away, but which often need a creative approach with fundamental technical knowledge.

name: Deltaray
description:
Deltaray is a machine manufacturing company that provides turnkey inspection solutions. || Deltaray is a machine manufacturing company that provides turnkey inspection solutions. | Deltaray is a new High-Tech company in the field of Quality Inspection Automation located in Belgium using Xray. 
Our disruptive 3D X-ray scanning technology 3DAX (patented, TM) provides fully automated quality inspection for large batches or 100% in-line inspection of mission-critical parts on the production floor. The 3DAX approach uses the part CAD model as a digital twin, part pose-automation, and AI for reliable quality analytics. It provides fully automated inspection at 5-25 µm precision, 100x faster than existing X-ray quality inspection solutions used today.

We offer turnkey inspection solutions as the missing link to zero defect industry leaders in their Industry 4.0 approach. A daily challenge of zero defect manufacturers is to assure quality for their customers. Closing the gap between increasing parts complexity and current inspection capabilities puts pressure on companies’ profitability. Assuring the quality of products is a crucial activity for every manufacturer. Just increasing the sample rate or adding 100% inspection by human eyes is not solving the problem.
Although visual camera inspection is widely adopted in such production environments, there is a big solution gap for fully automated inspection of the internals of products at line-speed. 

In contrast to visual inspection, X-ray imaging allows to penetrate objects and is therefore unique in its capability to visually check internal geometry and assembly correctness of industrial products. Our 3DAX - 3D Accelerated Xray technology is fully automated inspection solution of the internals of products at line-speed enabling up to 100% inspection of all parts produced. | Precision CNC manufacturing. | Delta-Ray Industries Inc manufactures precision components. The Company provides high speed production machining, CNC turning and milling, anodizing, painting, coating, plating, heat treating, welding, and raw material testing services. Delta-Ray Industries serves aerospace, military, oil, and commercial industries in the United States. | Aircraft Parts/Auxiliary Equipment Nec

name: INTRAVIS Vision Systems
description:
WE SOLVE PROBLEMS. BEFORE THEY OCCUR. As a market leader for vision inspection systems in the plastic packaging industry, INTRAVIS is a reliable partner for many leading packaging manufacturers and global players all over the world. In the areas of preforms, closures, stretch- and extrusion-blown bottles and containers, as well as decoration and la-beling, we offer systems that meet all of the requirements of a sustainable quality inspection solution. Our vision systems detect even the smallest defects. Faulty products are not only sorted out but de-tailed production insights and quality trends are issued. Thus, our systems enable our customers to quickly react in the right way and to even prevent the production of defective products. Overall, full production control and optimization becomes possible. description:

With a long experience in a variety of industries, UTPVision can develop solutions for virtually any application, precisely tailored to your needs.

Our cutting-edge inspection tools leverage machine vision algorithms, AI technology and patented multi-color illumination to quickly and reliably sort parts even at very high speed.

name: Delft Robotics
description:
Delft Robotics wants to make accessible robotic solutions for each task for each company by delivering turnkey systems. || Delft Robotics develops intelligent robotic systems to measure. | Delft Robotics wants to make accessible robotic solutions for each task for each company by delivering turnkey systems. | Delft Robotics started in 2014 as a spin-off of the European Union sponsored project 'Factory in a Day'. The project Factory-in-a-day aims to improve the competitiveness of European manufacturing SMEs by removing the primary obstacles for robot automation: installation time and installation cost. Due to the very positive feedback and large interest from the commercial sector, prof. dr. Martijn Wisse and Arie van den Ende kickstarted Delft Robotics. 
We aim to make more automation solutions accessible for small and medium sized production companies. With the use of industrial robotic arms and 3D vision solutions, highly flexible systems can be created with minimal development time. This allows for automation of repetitive and laborious production tasks which could previously only be performed by human employees.
Currently, Delft Robotics houses seven engineers - boasting expertise in robotic control, mechanical design, computer vision, artificial intelligence, system integration and human machine interaction. This team of engineers analyses new challenges, advises customers in next steps of automation, and develops and installs turnkey automation systems. Our close relation to the Delft University of Technology allows us to cooperate in the development of new technologies, and to use the new academic developments in the systems we deliver to our clients. Delft Robotics actively makes use of - and contributes to - the open source community for its products.

name: FORT Endoscope
description:
Combining the French expertise and the German quality, FORT is a dynamic SME, subsidiary of the viZaar group. Created in 1972, FORT has become an expert in industrial endoscopy, reaching a wide variety of sectors such as nuclear, aeronautics, railway, military and automotive.
We offer a remote visual inspection system which is very well adapted to the non-destructive testing requirement of the industry, from simple products such as lighting cables or the high-end products  such as the long range videoscope VUMAN E3, including the portable and autonomous videoscope VUCAM. 
FORT delivers most of its products in Europe (France, Germany, United Kingdom etc.) but it also experienced a relative success reaching the global market of United States, Russia and India.

name: ARCANITE
description: Arcanite Inc. is a Non-Destructive Examination company that specializes in providing advanced NDE services, consulting, training, and auditing. Arcanite was founded by a group of NDE specialists that together have over 50 years of NDE experience across various industry sectors. Arcanite possess industry-leading technical knowledge and project management skills that ensure ongoing quality, reliability and efficiency of our inspections while meeting project scope, cost, and scheduling constraints. Our vision is to provide our customers with new, more efficient, accurate and detailed inspection solutions. To do so we not only leverage the most advanced NDE technologies in the industry, but we also utilize highly qualified and experienced NDE professionals. By doing so we are able to deliver to our clients the highest quality inspection data, accurate/on time reporting, inspection repeatability and client assurance of our inspection results. That said, we do also offer traditional NDE methods to pair with our advanced techniques to service your more basic inspection requirements. description:
Welcome to the world of BReact

Contact Us
ABout Breact
BReact is an IT Start-Up based in Vienna, Austria that specializes in automating manual processes using artificial intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), Computer Vision (CV) and Large Language Models (LLM). We provide a cutting-edge platform that facilitates the implementation of divers use cases for real world applications. We strive to improve our software to address the requirements of every customer, as well as deliver a professional advisory service regarding AI Strategies.
Our goal is to guide our customers throughout the entire implementation lifecycle of an AI Solution. BReact offers everything from the initial concept and consulting, to the design and implementation of your AI Application. We want to assist your corporation in identifying key ways the technology can be used to innovate the way your company operates today, preparing you for the challenges that await tomorrow and allow you to focus on growing your core business.
We harness the power of Large Language Models to streamline and automate a wide range of business processes. By integrating these advanced AI technologies, we enable companies to enhance efficiency, reduce manual errors, and unlock innovative solutions across various domains such as document verification, knowledge management, personalized customer experiences, and secure on-premise implementations. Our approach focuses on leveraging LLMs to interpret and analyze large datasets, automate routine tasks, and provide insights, thereby driving productivity and fostering a smarter, more agile business environment.

We utilize Computer Vision technology to transform the way businesses interact with the visual world. By enabling machines to accurately interpret and respond to visual data, we automate tasks that require visual recognition such as quality inspection, inventory management, or pose position. This not only enhances operational efficiency but also opens new avenues for innovation, allowing businesses to leverage visual data in ways previously unimaginable, driving growth and competitive advantage in their respective industries.

name: Oculyze
description: The Oculyze computer vision cloud platform combines methodical patern recognition with AI to offer quantitative real-time image analysis. || The Oculyze computer vision cloud platform combines methodical patern recognition with AI to offer quantitative real-time image analysis. | Using cutting edge artificial intelligence (AI) technology, Oculyze has created computer vision software that automates tedious manual image analysis and speeds up lab work. This revolutionary approach was proven to be successful with the launching of the automated yeast cell counters & apps for breweries and wineries: •	Oculyze BB 2.0 (Better Brewing) Yeast Cell Counter App •	Oculyze FW (Fermentation Wine) Yeast Cell Counter App The Oculyze yeast cell counting kit works by using a microscope connected to a smartphone or tablet and the Oculyze app. The images are then uploaded to the cloud where they are analyzed by image recognition algorithms, offering quantitative real-time image analysis.  Breweries and wineries of all sizes around the world have now chosen to replace the time-consuming and human error - prone standard method (yeast cell count using haemocytometer) with Oculyze, a far more reliable, fast, and cost-saving solution for monitoring fermentation during all the stages of the production process.  While working on constantly improving its flagship products, Oculyze also focuses on bringing the advantages of cloud-based image recognition, like faster development time, lower cost and better image recognition to other applications such as ethanol and bioethanol (or ethanol fuel) production, blood or sperm counts, parasite detection in feces, asbestos fiber detection, emulsion analysis, and bacteria detection, thereby continuing to add applications to its cloud-based image recognition platform.   Oculyze can offer turnkey solutions to businesses, integrating three essential components – the image analysis platform (for data storage & backup, user authentication, and task handling), a custom image analysis & recognition software and the image capture software developed by Oculyze. Alternatively, owing to the open nature of Oculyze’s API, its image recognition software can be fully integrated into existing software, improving on the solutions that already work. | Oculyze developed a hand-held microscope with high magnification (~400X), it allows visualization of objects |10µm. The prototype consists of a removable optical module, a smart phone, an application and a connection to the server hosting the image analysis software. The optical module is attached to a smart phone and the magnified pictures is visible through the app on the screen. The… · More prototype then sends the image using WLAN or cellphone data to the server that analyses the picture using advanced computer vision techniques and returns the result within seconds. All images are processed and saved in the cloud. The device is handier and more affordable than conventional microscopes or cell counters.The first application is a quick and easy analysis of brewer's yeast, with a special focus on the needs of craft breweries. Our device is 10 times faster and 10 times cheaper than the competition. | Using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence Oculyze has transferred the computer vision software for lab equipment from the table top to the cloud. To prove this revolutionary approach works and is market ready, Oculyze launched the yeast cell counters for breweries and wineries. This device works using a microscope connected to a smartphone and the Oculyze app to upload the images to the cloud where they are analysed by image recognition algorithms. These combine methodical pattern recognition with artificial intelligence and deep learning to offer quantitative real-time image analysis. The cell counter has convinced yeast labs, breweries and wineries of all sizes around the world (Oculyze Better Brewing + Fermentation Wine). Oculyze MUH is the third turnkey product and allows for an on-site diagnosis of subclinical endometritis for cows. The next step for Oculyze is to use this proven technology to bring the advantages of cloud based image recognition, like faster development time, lower cost and better image recognition, to other applications like blood or sperm counts, parasite detection in feces, asbestos fibre detection, emulsion analysis and bacteria detection, hereby continuing to add applications to its cloud based image recognition platform. The beauty of this solution is that it can be delivered in two ways: One is a brand new system developed specifically for an application, and the second is the combination of APIs and Apps that enable the company to upgrade existing hardware like scanning electron microscopes (SEM) or the good old lab microscope. | Oculyze GmbH provides software solutions. The Company develops and builds smartphone microscopes and automated image recognition software application. Oculyze serves customers in Germany. | Release Date 2016 About Oculyze Better Brewing makes yeast counting and viability analysis easy for craft brewers. Company Overview Oculyze is an award winning (Science4Life, BPW, TechnologySlam) Startup that creates custom solutions for image analysis. With our hand-held microscope and imag ... e recognition service we enable you to take a microscopic image and get a result within seconds, no expensive equipment or specific expertise required! Our vision is: Microscopic analysis for everyone, everywhere. Our first application is “Oculyze - Better Brewing”: A quick and easy analysis of brewer's yeast, with a special focus on the needs of craft breweries. We automatically determine the concentration and the cell-viability of yeast. Our device is significantly faster and significantly cheaper than the competition. This is only the beginning however, other application in various stages of development are: Automated cervix analysis for dairy cows, sperm analysis (CASA), malaria detection and wastewater monitoring. name: BERTHA project
description:
Funded by the European Union with €7.9 million under the Horizon Europe programme, the BERTHA project aims to develop a scalable and probabilistic Driver Behavioural Model (DBM) mostly based on the Bayesian Belief Network.

The DBM will be implemented on an open-source, HUB (repository) to validate the technological and practical feasibility of the solution with the industry and become a unique approach for the model's worldwide scalability. 

The resulting DBM will be translated into a simulating platform, CARLA, using diverse demos which allow the building of new driving models in the platform.

BERTHA will also include a methodology which, due to the HUB, will share the model with the scientific community to ease its growth.

The project includes a set of interrelated demonstrators to show this DBM approach as a reference to design human-like, easily predictable and acceptable behaviour of automated driving functions in mixed traffic scenarios.

The BERTHA consortium is formed by 14 partners from 6 different countries, coordinated by Instituto de Biomecánica de Valencia (IBV) (ES). The other partners are Institut Vedecom (FR), Université Gustave Eiffel (FR), German Research Center for Artificial Intelligence (DE), Computer Vision Center (ES), Altran Deutschland (DE), Continental Engineering Services (FR), CIDAUT Foundation (ES), Austrian Institute of Technology (AT), Universitat de València (ES), Europcar International (FR), FI Group (PT), Panasonic Automotive Systems Europe (DE) and the Korea Transport Institute (KOTI).

Defensya is a R&D technology company that specializes in defense and aerospace consultancy and engineering services. || Defensya is a R&D technology company that specializes in defense and aerospace consultancy and engineering services. | Vision Systems Specialists

DEFENSYA is an innovative technological company founded in July 2001, highly interested in innovation, design, art of inventing and making things right. Research and development are our key elements in business.

We specialize in Defence and Aerospace consultancy and engineering services and particularly all aspects of a vision system (avionics): We develop and manufacture items such as video monitors, image, audio and data management systems (including compression, decompression, encryption, decryption and storage for multiple channels synchronously), lighting (LED and laser-based high power) and special cameras.

With an impressive patents record (more than twenty patented inventions) in Defense, industrial and civil areas and more than ten years working directly with Airbus Military, all our products are designed, developed and manufactured  to improve previous solutions at reasonable prizes.

name: Muller Technology
description:
Muller Technology provides automation and tooling solutions for various industries. The company develops systems such as in-mold labeling automation, takeout automation, thermoforming equipment, and robotic stackers. Its portfolio also includes vision inspection systems, case packing and palletizing machines, mobile automation, and turnkey mold solutions. Muller Technology supports clients across sectors including food and beverage, medical devices, health and personal care, semiconductors, and industrial production. In addition to equipment, the company offers consulting, pilot phase support, training, and aftermarket services. Its solutions focus on optimizing production processes, ensuring consistent product quality, and enabling flexible manufacturing. By combining engineering expertise with automation, Muller Technology helps businesses improve operational efficiency and adapt to evolving market requirements. || Automation Equipment in Fort Collins, CO. | Muller Technology specializes in mold making and automation technology for thin-wall plastic packaging development. | Muller Technology provides automation and tooling solutions for various industries. By combining engineering expertise with automation, Muller Technology helps businesses improve operational efficiency and adapt to evolving market requirements. | World Leading Automation Systems for Thin Wall Packaging of Food, Consumer Goods, Personal Care and other applications - combines with mold know-how and fully established production sites in America and Switzerland. 

Muller Technology is made up by two divisions: Industrial Automation and Injection Molds.

The Industrial Automation division offers state-of-the-art automation and advanced robotics solutions to various industries to enhance productivity and efficiency. MULLER designs and makes manufacturing production lines using dynamic and innovative Industry 4.0 technologies like Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMRs), Collaborative Robots (Cobots), Robot Arms (6-axis, SCARA), Vision Systems and Digital Twins.

The Injection Mold-making division provides high-precision solutions in the area of In-Mold Labelling and Injection-Compression molding to meet the unique needs of each customer. MULLER focuses on environmental footprint reduction and Sustainability through light-weighting of packaging solutions, and substitution of plastics with renewable materials.
 
Our team of experts works closely with clients to understand their challenges and develop tailored solutions that improve productivity and increase competitiveness. 

Both divisions work together to ensure that the company stays ahead of the curve, delivering innovative products and services that set the standard for their industries. Customers include manufacturers of complex components, and brand owners in the food, pharma, medical, and personal care industry. 

With operations in southern Switzerland and Colorado, USA, the company has a strong global presence and is well-positioned to serve clients around the world. name: 4JET
description:
The 4JET Group combines two highly innovative companies under one roof: 4JET Technologies GmbH specializes in laser systems for cleaning, ablation, and modification of delicate technical surfaces. Key products include machines for cleaning of automotive parts and tire molds, tire marking and bonding preparation. Customers include virtually all leading tire makers and numerous automotive suppliers and OEMs. 4JET microtech GmbH specializes in micromachining solutions for cutting and drilling of brittle materials such as glass, as well as solutions for thin-film ablation. Our unique process technologies such as the PearlCut glass cutting process or our LEAF technology for micronscale surface modification target the speciality glass, display and PV industry. Established in 2006 we now employ a team of about 150 experts in our headquarter in Alsdorf (Germany), Prutting near Rosenheim (Germany) the US, and China. Our international customer base in over 40 countries is being supported by a network of subsidiary offices and agencies for sales and technical service. See www.4jet.de for more information. || The 4JET Group combines two highly innovative companies under one roof: 4JET Technologies GmbH specializes in laser systems for cleaning, ablation, and modification of delicate technical surfaces. Key products include machines for cleaning of automotive parts and tire molds, tire marking and bonding preparation. Customers include virtually all leading tire makers and numerous automotive suppliers and OEMs. 4JET microtech GmbH specializes in micromachining solutions for cutting and drilling of brittle materials such as glass, as well as solutions for thin-film ablation. Our unique process technologies such as the PearlCut glass cutting process or our LEAF technology for micronscale surface modification target the speciality glass, display and PV industry. Established in 2006 we now employ a team of about 150 experts in our headquarter in Alsdorf (Germany), Prutting near Rosenheim (Germany) the US, and China. Our international customer base in over 40 countries is being supported by a network of subsidiary offices and agencies for sales and technical service. See www.4jet.de for more information. | Our Mission? Perfect Surfaces  

We combine laser process technology, software, machine vision, automation and peripherals with turnkey-installation and lifecycle support for maintenance, repair and upgrades. We enable mission-critical high volume production of next generation consumer devices, automotive parts, solar cells or medical devices.  
We work for the category leaders in our niches. Our customers include virtually all leading manufacturers of technical glass, tires and numerous Fortune 500 companies from automotive suppliers and OEMs.
We have a deep understanding of micromachining solutions for cutting and drilling of brittle materials such as glass or semiconductors, as well as solutions for thin-film ablation and cleaning. 
Established in 2006 we now employ a team of about 250 experts in our headquarter in Alsdorf (Germany), Krailling (near Munich, Germany) as well as satellite offices and service hubs in the US, China and Taiwan. Our international customer base in over 40 countries is being supported by a network of subsidiary offices and agencies for sales and technical service.

See www.4jet.de for more information. | 4JET Technologies specializes in laser systems for cleaning, ablation, and modification of delicate technical surfaces. | 4JET is a manufacturer of laser systems for the treatment of technical surfaces. Since its founding in 2006, the company has quickly become the leading manufacturer of laser systems for the edge deletion of thin-film solar cells and the labeling of tires. The company also supplies laser systems for other industrial cleaning tasks and produces pulsed CO2 lasers for surface treatment. Since 2007, 4JET has been cooperating with Mitsubishi International GmbH, a subsidiary of Mitsubishi Corporation (Tokyo), in worldwide sales. At the Hückelhoven site, a team of physicists and engineers is working on both the development of laser process technology and the integration of processes into turnkey production plants for industrial use.

name: AUDITECH
description:
Auditech provides consultancy in engineering maintenance, services in preventive maintenance with particular attention to energy saving. Following the legislative decree 102/2014, in order to fully exploit the synergies between the maintenance engineering and energy engineering, has also decided to provide advice on issues of energy conservation and energy audits in accordance with ISO50001.
One of the strengths of Auditech in predictive maintenance and energy savings is a unique know-how in Italy on innovative Air & Structure Borne Ultrasound that is complementary, synergistic and integrated thermal imaging and all 'vibration analysis and oil.
In the field of services, Auditech offers:
- Recognition and management of losses of compressed air, steam and technical gases (leak management)
- Consulting and Audit diagnostic evolved into mechanical inspections, with particular attention to the process of lubrication and rotating machines, but not only in slow motion
- Electrical inspections at M / A-voltage panels closed, the transformer oil and resin and coming from the distribution network in AT
In consulting our approach follows the guiding principles of TPM®/MP (Total Productive Maintenance/Productive Maintenance).
In summary:
- Prevention
- Monitoring
- Work of the Multidisciplinary Group (Maintenance, Production, Planning, Quality, Safety)
- Auto Maintenance (direct contribution to the maintenance and selected by the financial year)
- Continuous improvement (including training at all levels)
In the field of education we offer:
- Courses certified Level 1 and Level 2 for thermography in accordance with ISO9712:2012 and ISO18436-7, second ultrasound standard SO18436-8, vibration analysis in accordance with ISO18436-2.

name: SOLMET-7
description:
Solmet-7 was founded in 2006 to provide solutions for mechanisation and welding for mass-produced parts in the automotive industry. Later on, thanks to the team’s extensive experience, a market study was carried out and the company management decided to expand the business portfolio to include a department to design (mechanical engineering) manufacture, assemble and commission machinery (turnkey) and tools for industry.

Made up of a team of experienced professionals, Solmet-7, S.L. Produces tailor-made solutions for assembly processes, including flexible manufacturing systems for pallets and stand alone stations, assembly and production lines that use robotic vision systems, rotary machinery for welding stations (MIG-MAG, resistance, etc.) and handling (pick and place, elevators, conveyors, etc.).
We also offer more specific and complex products such as “Test Machinery”, which ensures that the final product sent to the client meets the technical requirements in terms of size and resistance, etc., and includes: 

•	Leak detection equipment.
•	Fatigue testing equipment.
•	Dimensional inspection equipment.

Over the last 10 years we formed a network of partners who worked with us and advised us on mechanical, computer and/or programming projects, in order to offer the best possible solution for our clients’ needs. These tasks are centralised through our Engineering department, which coordinates, manages and controls all the phases of each project to ensure that they meet the client’s specifications.

name: YXLON International
description:
Comet Yxlon GmbH develops x-ray and CT system solutions. The Company creates inspection systems for all types of cast parts, new materials, electronic components, batteries, and welded joints. Comet Yxlon caters to semiconductors, electronics, automotive, additive manufacturing, and aerospace industries worldwide. || Led by experience. Driven by curiosity.

Good solutions start with good questions. At Comet Yxlon, our curiosity and passion for technology are the drivers behind our collaborative approach in product development. Based on customer feedback, we develop high-end X-ray and CT system solutions that enable non-destructive testing in the semiconductor/electronics, automotive and aerospace industries - from R&D labs to production settings.

With our headquarters in Hamburg, sales and service locations inSan Jose (California), Yokohama, Shanghai, Hsinshu (Taiwan) and Suwon (Korea), as well as a network of representatives in over 50 countries, Comet Yxlon serves customers locally - all over the world.

Pioneering spirit meets decades of experience.

Innovation is an old tradition at Comet Yxlon. Our roots go back to the discovery of X-rays by Wilhelm Conrad Röntgen in 1895 and the construction of the first X-ray tube by Carl Heinrich Florenz Müller in Hamburg in 1896. Their legacy still inspires us today in our effort to develop cutting-edge inspection solutions that create sustainable progress.

Part of Comet.

We’re proud to be part of Comet, the globally leading Swiss technology company with a focus on plasma control and X-ray technology.

name: Nommas
description:
We serve as a professional vision solution provider for smart manufacturing to promote automation towards industry 4.0. In the first stage, our priority is to help diversify the kingdom's economy by promoting automation for 7000+ industrial manufacturers of 20+ key categories.  Based on our decent research experience, we use advanced computer vision and machine learning technologies to identify and understand visual features generated in manufacturing production lines and to further automate the operations into a degree much faster, cheaper, and more accurate than labor. Through this approach, a smart solution is designed to promote automation in real-time inspection, quality control, sorting, robotic guidance, and integrated monitoring/analytics, which used to be carried out and observed only by human. With the developments of new techniques in computer vision and machine learning, we are committed to break the technical barriers in this area and to bring new possibilities that are not previously feasible.  We developed a modular system (hardware & software) to be customized and installed for various production scenarios. The hardware (industrial camera module, lighting module, mechanical module) is designed with portable modules, and the software (user interface)/ algorithm (feature recognition and understanding) is based on a neural network trained by samples collected from realistic operations. This makes our product self-adjustable and highly flexible to fit various production line scenarios.  We help the manufacturers largely improve production efficiency and reduce economic losses, and substantially enhance the grade and reputation by reducing the occurrence of defects and minimizing customer complaint. || We don’t just write software. name: ASTI Mobile Robotics Deutschland
description:
InSystems Automation wurde 1999 gegründet. Seitdem ist das Unternehmen stetig gewachsen und beschäftigt seine hoch qualifizierten Mitarbeiter in Berlin Adlershof.

Zum Geschäftsfeld zählten zunächst SPS-Programmierung und Serviceleistungen, in denen die beiden Geschäftsführer umfangreiche Erfahrungen, auch im internationalen Projektgeschäft, aus ihrer langjährigen Tätigkeit bei Gillette Deutschland mitgebracht haben.

Der Tätigkeitsbereich wurde auf Hochsprachenprogrammierung, Visualisierung und Materialflusssteuerungen sowie auf die Systemintegration von Bildverarbeitung und RFID-Technik erweitert. Durch die Zusammenarbeit mit Fördertechnik- und Maschinenbauunternehmen übernahm InSystems Automation auch Elektroprojektierung, Schaltschrankbau und Inbetriebnahme der Maschinen und Anlagen.

Die Automatisierungstechnik hat sich in den letzten Jahren stark weiter entwickelt. Datenerfassung und -auswertung während der Fertigung erweitern die Möglichkeiten für Qualitätssicherung, Materialflusssteuerung und Optimierung von Produktionsanlagen.
Gleichzeitig steigen aber die Anforderungen durch größere Modellvielfalt bei kleineren Losgrößen hinsichtlich Flexibilität und Effektivität. Maschinen und Anlagen müssen heute schnell umrüstbar sein und eine sehr hohe Verfügbarkeit haben, um teuere Produktionszeit effektiv zu nutzen.

Sich diesen Herausforderungen stellend, liefert InSystems Sondermaschinen und Anlagen als Generalunternehmer und bietet den vollen Service aus einer Hand. || InSystems Automation wurde 1999 gegründet. name: IDloop
description:

Prüftechnik produces and supplies dosing and testing systems for greases, oils, and pastes in industrial automation. | Weil wir uns auf das konzentrieren was wir können, entwickeln und realisieren wir maßgeschneiderte und passgenaue Systeme, die konsequent an die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden gerichtet sind.
Alles aus einer Hand, wir begleiten Ihre Aufträge individuell und komplett von der Idee bis zur umfassenden Inbetriebnahme und ausführlicher Übergabe vor Ort. Unsere Fachabteilungen arbeiten bis zur Auslieferung eng zusammen und sichern so zu jeder Zeit eine kompetente Beratung und Betreuung. Jeder Auftrag hat seinen eigenen Projekteiter dieser überwacht alle relevanten Faktoren, wie z.B. die Qualität oder die Einhaltung des Budgets und die Zeitplanung.
Als Anbieter von Komplettlösungen entwickeln und erstellen unsere Konstrukteure eine detaillierte und maßgeschneiderte 3-D Modellierung, dazu nutzen sie die CAD-Software Creo Elements/Direct Modeling. Die dazugehörigen Pneumatik- und Schaltpläne werden in FluidDraw erstellt. Um höchste Qualitätsergebnisse zu erzielen, werden neben der Konstruktionsplanung systematische Gefährdungsanalysen und Risikobewertungen mit Safexpert durchgeführt. Durch die Verwendung von Prozess- Checklisten und Prozessorientierte QMS-nahe Vorgehensweisen überwachen wir jeden einzelnen Ablauf und haben so die Möglichkeit, die eigenen Prozesse ständig zu optimieren und zu verbessern.
Im Bereich der Hardware- und Softwareentwicklung, sowie im Schaltschrankbau verwenden wir die aktuellsten Tools und Techniken. Unsere Hardwarespezialisten verfügen über eine hohe Kompetenz im Bereich CE-Konformität und Maschinenrichtlinien, sie konstruieren normgerechte Schaltpläne mit System E-Plan und überwachen die Herstellung aller Komponenten bis zur elektrischen Abnahme mit hauseigenen Messmitteln. Wir nutzen standardisierte Software und Programmmodule.
Die D+P Standard Steuerungen werden mit einer Siemenssteuerung realisiert und mit TIA programmiert. Unsere Softwareentwickler begleiten auch den Inbetriebnahme Prozess vor Ort.
Die Fertigung erfolgt in enger Zusammenarbeit mit der mechanischen Konstruktion, sodass auch technische Probleme schnellstmöglich gelöst werden können. Ein modern und hochwertig ausgestatteter Maschinenpark durchdachte und effiziente Fertigungsstrategien und gut ausgebildetes Fachpersonal machen uns zu einem kompetenten Partner der Zerspanungstechnik. Durch unsere Unterschiedlichen Dreh-, Fräs-, und Schleifmaschinen sind wir in der Lage sämtliche einfache bis komplexe Bauteile selbst herzustellen.
Zusammen mit der Konstruktion und der Steuerungstechnik erarbeitet und erstellt unsere technische Redaktion CE-konforme Dokumentationen, Betriebsanleitungen und Einbauanleitungen für jede von uns hergestellte Maschine, Anlage und Komponente auf Wunsch in Papier- oder Digitaler Form. Schließlich steht bei uns nicht nur die rechtliche Absicherung im Vordergrund, sondern auch eine einfache und Verständliche Bedienerfreundlichkeit für unsere Kunden.

PSS, Product Scanning Solutions, provides solutions to reduce costs, improve efficiency and tracking & tracing by barcode, RFID or GP(R)S. Our roots can be found in paper, printing and packaging.

name: Evacuator World Wide
description:
The Evacuator is the Worlds Only Fire and Panic-proof Collective Evacuation Escape Descent System for heights up to 300 metres.
The Evacuator, based on steel cables, can be used in case of emergency evacuation escape scenarios in wind turbines, oilrigs , high buildings, tower cranes, construction sites etc etc. 
The Evacuator evacuation escape descent system is engineered for heights up to 300 meters and is able to descent multiple people at the same time. 
The Evacuator evacuation descent system is certified by DEKRA Germany according EN341 Descent Devices. 
The Evacuator is a preinstalled/fixed Click and Go evacuation escape descent system that makes an escape very simple WITHIN 10 SECONDS. 
The use of the Evacuator evacuation escape descent system is very simple, connect your safety harness onto the yellow hook of the Evacuator and you're ready to start your descent.
The descent is fully automatic with a speed of 1m/s.
The Evacuator evacuation escape descent system brings compliance to the Official European Safety Standard for Wind Turbines EN50308, Descent Device Must Be Fire Proof!
The Evacuator evacuation escape descent system is invented, engineered and manufactured in the Netherlands. 
The Evacuator evacuation escape descent system is WorldWide Patented. 
More information: www.Evacuator.com , www.TeSuCoN.nl , www.Survitecgroup.com

name: LiteSentry - Softsolution - Strainoptics
description:
WHERE ULTIMATE INSPECTION TECHNOLOGY IS BORN

LiteSentry, Softsolution, and Strainoptics unite to provide leading inspection and quality assurance technology with global service and support.

We lead every step in the process – original inspection and quality assurance technologies originated here.

•	LiteSentry, since 1999, offers automated, precise, 100% inline inspection of flat glass and plastic sheets worldwide.

•	Softsolution, for over two decades, is the top developer of automated quality assurance systems for the glass industry. 

•	Strainoptics, founded in 1985, pioneers stress measurement instrumentation.

LEADERS IN INSPECTION, PROCESS CONTROL, AND AUTOMATIC GLASS QUALITY ASSURANCE SYSTEMS

We provide a product for every fabrication step. From float lines to tempering, IGU, or laminates, we offer the perfect solution for quality assurance and process control – real-time data, alarm notifications, automatic report generation, and more. We proudly collaborate with the world's leading glass and window manufacturers.

Our latest innovations include the BowScanner – an inline vertical bow measurement device. We've enhanced the Osprey Complete Anisotropy & Distortion Inspection System, with quality testing and a database categorized by coating or product type for superior knowledge and process control. This system seamlessly integrates into the LineScanner Archive Server, allowing a single data file for both Osprey and LineScanner on the same production line. || WHERE ULTIMATE INSPECTION TECHNOLOGY IS BORN

LiteSentry, Softsolution, and Strainoptics unite to provide leading inspection and quality assurance technology with global service and support.

We lead every step in the process – original inspection and quality assurance technologies originated here.

•	LiteSentry, since 1999, offers automated, precise, 100% inline inspection of flat glass and plastic sheets worldwide.

•	Softsolution, for over two decades, is the top developer of automated quality assurance systems for the glass industry. 

•	Strainoptics, founded in 1985, pioneers stress measurement instrumentation.

LEADERS IN INSPECTION, PROCESS CONTROL, AND AUTOMATIC GLASS QUALITY ASSURANCE SYSTEMS

We provide a product for every fabrication step. From float lines to tempering, IGU, or laminates, we offer the perfect solution for quality assurance and process control – real-time data, alarm notifications, automatic report generation, and more. We proudly collaborate with the world's leading glass and window manufacturers.

Our latest innovations include the BowScanner – an inline vertical bow measurement device. We've enhanced the Osprey Complete Anisotropy & Distortion Inspection System, with quality testing and a database categorized by coating or product type for superior knowledge and process control. This system seamlessly integrates into the LineScanner Archive Server, allowing a single data file for both Osprey and LineScanner on the same production line. | Since 1999, LiteSentry has been developing technologies to solve the hard problems of inspection and measurement for glass fabricators. Our tools provide automated, accurate, 100% on-line inspection of flat glass and plastic sheets for manufacturers around the world. At the heart of our business is a passion for new technology that solves our customers’ most difficult challenges. Our unique combination of skills in Machine Vision, Optics, Light, Opto-electronics, Glass and Coatings on Glass, and Mechanics are powerful drivers of improvements in glass inspection, process control, and quality. LiteSentry systems cover every step of the production process from initial load validation to scratch and defect detection, distortion and flatness inspection, and orientation of sheets and coatings prior to assembly of insulated glass units. Since our first inspection system was installed in April 2000 (still running 24/7 nearly two decades later!), more than 400 LiteSentry inspection systems and 1,000 sensors have been installed in glass fabrication plants around the world. Over the years, we have developed strong relationships with customers including industry leaders Viracon, Oldcastle, Trulite, Tristar, Vitro (PPG) CF, Guardian SF, AGC, Pilkington/NSG, Saint-Gobain, Cardinal, Central Glass, Tecnoglass, and many others. Today, we solve increasingly sophisticated problems by working in close partnership with more than 100 customers — from industry leaders with multiple product lines and manufacturing facilities, to highly specialized manufacturers with a single plant. We give our customers the tools and technologies they need to develop better process control and make higher quality glass. LiteSentry systems are designed and manufactured in the USA, and are used in manufacturing plants worldwide. We are proud to say that LiteSentry is setting the standard in glass inspection.

name: TesTex NDT
description:
TesTex NDT specializes in non-destructive testing for storage tanks, boilers, pressure vessels, heat exchangers, and condensers. || TesTex NDT specializes in non-destructive testing for storage tanks, boilers, pressure vessels, heat exchangers, and condensers. | TesTex NDT carry out very specialist inspection services across the UK and Europe - utilising in house technologies.

TesTex are one of the largest specialist storage tank Inspection companies in the UK by volume of units inspected per year. Last year alone, we Inspected over 500 above ground storage tanks with the vast majority being Inspected to either EEMUA 159 or API 653. We currently have 8 EEMUA 159 Assessors and 2 API 653 Inspectors on our books.

TesTex typically inspect Storage Tanks, Condensers, Heat Exchangers, Boiler Tubes, Pressure Vessels, Process Columns and Pipelines.

We use several methods such as:

Ultrasonics
Eddy Current Testing (ECT)
Dye Penetrant Inspection (DPI)
Magnetic Particle Inspection (MPI)
Remote Field Electromagnetic Technique (RFET)
Low Frequency Electromagnetic Technique (LFET)
Balanced Field Electromagnetic Technique (BFET)
IRIS Tube Inspection System | TesTex NDT is a non-destructive testing company specialising in providing inspection services for piping, tubing, storage tanks and pressure vessels using such techniques as;
- Remote Field Electromagnetics (RFET)
- Low Frequency Electromagnetics (LFET)
- Eddy Current (ECT)
- IRIS
- Ultrasonics
- Long Range Ultrasonic Technique (LRUT)
- Remote Visual Inspection (RVI)
Our UK office is based in Lincolnshire and was opened at the beginning of 2000. TesTex NDT Ltd carry out inspection work all over the UK and Europe serving the needs of the chemical, petroleum, bulk storage, power and offshore industries.
All of our staff receive extensive technical training and also bring many years of inspection experience gained in Europe and around the world. All of our Field Technicians are, at the least, Level II PCN, CSWIP, EEMUA, API and or ASNT qualified in their relevant fields. All our personnel are highly trained and conscientious, our integrity is second to none and this has helped us secure and maintain many prestigious clients around the world.
TesTex is proud of its safety record, as with all projects, safety plays an important role in the work and this is something we have continually invested in. All TesTex personnel are CCNSG Safety Passport Scheme accredited and where applicable, are trained in Confined Space Entry as identified by the Confined Spaces Regulations, 1997.
As with safety, TesTex is also aware of the importance of a fully documented and working Quality System. To this, we have gained the BS EN ISO 9001: 2000 Certificate.

name: Consyd Software GmbH & Co.
description:
Consyd Software entwickelt anspruchsvolle Software für technische Systeme. Wir sind seit 1999 im Süden Deutschlands ansässig.

Automatisierungstechnik

Wir sind kompetenter Partner, wenn es darum geht, Ihre Systeme zu automatisieren. Unsere Dienstleistungen reichen dabei von der Steuerung und Regelung der Systeme bis hin zur Visualisierung der Anlage. Konsequent setzen wir Internettechnologien bei unseren Aufgaben ein.

Prozessvisualisierung

Wir können auf unsere entwickelten und erprobten Software-Komponenten zurückgreifen. Wir entwickeln und liefern Komponenten und Komplettsysteme.
Zum Beispiel im Bereich Durchsatz-Optimierung in der Halbleiter Industrie erzielen wir mit unseren Schedule-Modulen nachhaltige Erfolge. 

Bildverarbeitung

Wir bieten Ihnen für verschiedene Anwendungsfälle wie Fehlererkennung, Positionierung von mechanischen Teilen, Abnutzung, Lasertechnik oder weiteren Problemfeldern eine Lösung an.
Zum Beispiel Automatisieren eines Röntgen Messsystems mit Auswertung.

Realtime und embedded Systeme

Wir portieren diverse Betriebssysteme auf Ihr Zielsystem und entwickeln bei Bedarf entsprechende Treiber. Sowohl für Desktop- oder embedded-Betriebssystemen (z.B. VxWorks, INtime, Windows CE, Embedded Win) realisieren wir seit Jahren erfolgreich Projekte.

Webanwendungen

Konsequent nutzen wir Internettechniken für Kommunikation und Benutzerführung. Deshalb setzen wir neben ASP.NET  und node.js auch aktuelle Web-Sprachen (JS, HTML5) erfolgreich ein. 
Wir binden Ihr System an Standard Web Server an oder integrieren Web Server Dienste in Ihre Firmware und erweitern damit Ihre Anwendung um Server Client Funktionalität. Dazu schreiben wir die passenden Internet-Applikationen.

Bevorzugte Techniken

Sprachen:       C#, C++, Java
Web:               HTML, CSS, JavaScript (Angular, node.js)
Realtime:        VxWorks, Intime, QNX
Mobilgeräte:    Xamarin, native OS
