name: 4DSP
description:
4DSP LLC of Austin, Texas. Founded in 2004, 4DSP designs and manufactures commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) high speed digital signal processing and data acquisition solutions based on FPGA technology to address the specific requirements of aerospace, defense, biomedical, communications and semiconductor applications. || 4DSP is a designer and manufacturer of commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) board-level electronics. | 4DSP LLC of Austin, Texas. Founded in 2004, 4DSP designs and manufactures commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) high speed digital signal processing and data acquisition solutions based on FPGA technology to address the specific requirements of aerospace, defense, biomedical, communications and semiconductor applications. | 4dsp, LLC was founded in 2004. The company's line of business includes providing management consulting services. | 4DSP., LLC provides data acquisition and signal processing products. The Company offers commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) board-level electronics, Intellectual Property (IP Core), and system level solutions. 4DSP serves customers in the United State and the Netherlands. | 4DSP LLC is an Austin, Texas-based corporation dedicated to the design and manufacture of commercial off-the-shelf (COTS) board-level electronics, FPGA Intellectual Property (IP Core), and system level solutions. With the most advanced digitizers and FPGA-based products, 4DSP has a reputation for delivering high-performance DSP solutions for the specific requirements of Military, Aerospace, Biomedical and Chemical Science applications. As an AS9100 certified company, 4DSP excels at providing solutions that make an impact in both the lab and the field.

Our products are available in board-level as well as at the system-level, providing solutions for applications such as Image Processing, Software Defined Radio (SDR), RADAR, SONAR, Airborne Surveillance, Medical Imaging, and Fiber Optic Sensing. 4DSP's product development is driven by customer requirements for new and retroactive insertion of technological advancements in state-of-the-art semiconductor devices: Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGA), General Purpose Processors (GPP), Analog-to-Digital (A/D) converters, and Digital-to-Analog (D/A) converters.

4DSP products are complemented by our Engineering Services, which include the development of custom hardware, FPGA firmware and software, as well as turn-key solutions.

4DSP serves hundreds of customers across multiple industries and works with some of the most prestigious Defense and Aerospace organizations, including Raytheon, Northrop Grumman, NASA, Philips, The Boeing Co., BAE Systems, Lockheed Martin, U.S. Navy, ViaSat, Pratt & Whitney and many more. | Ontwikkelen, produceren en uitgeven van software

name: KSV Koblenzer Steuerungs- und Verteilungsbau
description:
Die KSV Koblenzer Steuerungs- und Verteilungsbau GmbH ist ihr kompetenter und zuverlässiger Ansprechpartner in allen Fragestellungen der Energie- und Anlagentechnik, Steuerungs- und Automatisierungstechnik sowie der Mess- und Prüftechnik.

Im Bereich der Energie- und Anlagentechnik planen und realisieren wir den gesamten Strang der Energieverteilung. Von der Mittelspannungseinspeisung bis zur Unterverteilung sowie den zugehörigen Systemen der Gebäudeleittechnik und des Energiemanagement - bei uns erhalten Sie dies aus einer Hand.

In unserem Geschäftsbereich Steuerungs- und Automatisierungstechnik planen, fertigen und programmieren wir komplette industrielle Automations- und Robotik-Anwendungen. Vom Bau einzelner Steuerschränke über die Programmierung von Steuerungssystemen bis zur Implementierung von Prozessleitsystemen - wir bieten Ihnen dies aus einer Hand.

Systeme der Mess- und Prüftechnik bilden den Kern unseres dritten Geschäftsbereichs. Neben den eigentlichen Mess- und Prüfsystemen bieten wir gerne auch deren Montage und Inbetriebnahme an - alles aus einer Hand.

Unser Fokus als KSV Koblenzer Steuerungs- und Verteilungsbau GmbH liegt dabei stets auf einer langfristigen und partnerschaftlichen Zusammenarbeit. Wir möchten durch Leistung und Zuverlässigkeit überzeugen und ihr Vertrauen gewinnen.

Vom Bau einzelner Steuerschränke über die Programmierung von Steuerungssystemen bis zur Implementierung von Prozessleitsystemen - wir bieten Ihnen dies aus einer Hand.

Systeme der Mess- und Prüftechnik bilden den Kern unseres dritten Geschäftsbereichs. Neben den eigentlichen Mess- und Prüfsystemen bieten wir gerne auch deren Montage und Inbetriebnahme an - alles aus einer Hand.

Unser Fokus als KSV Koblenzer Steuerungs- und Verteilungsbau GmbH liegt dabei stets auf einer langfristigen und partnerschaftlichen Zusammenarbeit. Wir möchten durch Leistung und Zuverlässigkeit überzeugen und ihr Vertrauen gewinnen.

Das Produktspektrum der KSV Koblenzer Steuerungs- und Verteilungsbau GmbH umfasst:
- Energieverteilungssysteme bis 7.000A
- Mittelspannungsschaltanlagen und - transformatoren
- Gebäudeleittechnik
- Energiemanagement
- Industrieautomations-Anwendungen
- Industrielle Robotik-Anwendungen
- Optische Kontroll- und Regelsysteme
- SPS- und HMI-Programmierung
- Prozessvisualisierungs- und SCADA-Systeme
- Systeme der Mess- und Prüftechnik

Planung, Projektierung, Realisierung

Sprechen Sie uns an.
Wir freuen uns auf Sie! | Die KSV Koblenzer Steuerungs- und Verteilungsbau GmbH plant, projektiert und realisiert Energieverteilungssysteme, Mittelspannungsanlagen, Industrieautomations-Anwendungen, Gebäudeleittechnik sowie optische Kontrollsysteme und Prozessvisualisierung.

Ossis' implants are used in orthopaedic,  ... spine and maxillo-facial surgeries.    Ossis' patient-specific implants are designed and manufactured to the highest standards - integrating advanced image processing, design software and manufacturing technologies to deliver innovative solutions to complex surgical procedures.     Ossis’ design and manufacturing experience allows us to create custom implant solutions in all areas of the anatomy, not only producing standalone solutions, but also custom solutions based on our unique manufactured structures incorporating ‘off the shelf’ implants (such as total knee and femoral components) manufactured by all major orthopaedic device companies. OSSIS provides a remedy for significant bone loss and pelvic dissociations, where surgeons would otherwise have to devise a sophisticated solution during surgery. | About Ossis specialises in the design and manufacture of custom implants. Ossis specialises in the design and manufacture of custom orthopedic implants and catering to the individual needs of Patients and Surgeons worldwide. | OSSIS specialises in custom 3D print implants catering to the individual needs of patients and surgeons worldwide.  We've been designing and manufacturing patient-specific orthopaedic implants for 12+ years.

OSSIS custom acetabulum augments are designed and manufactured to the highest standards - integrating advanced image processing, design software and manufacturing technologies to deliver innovative orthopedic implant solutions for complex surgical procedures.

OSSIS provides a solution for severe bone loss and pelvic dissociations where surgeons are otherwise faced with creating a complex solution during surgery. OSSIS creates a custom solution that is fit for only you and your patient. By performing much of the surgical planning before getting in to theatre, the unknowns are removed before surgery. An interactive and open communication approach is maintained with the surgeon during the design phase to ensure the final solution is customised to the surgeon’s needs.

OSSIS custom acetabulum augments are manufactured using advanced additive manufacturing techniques which create a solid one piece component with proven osseointegrative properties. Advanced design and manufacturing technologies contribute to a lead time of only three to four weeks after receiving the CT scan.

To ensure successful surgeries, OSSIS provides sterilisable plastic anatomical models and a sterilisable plastic trial of the implant. These models allow the surgeon to undertake preoperative surgical planning and being sterilisable they can be used for intraoperative reference. This leads to shorter successful surgeries and successful patient outcomes.

OSSIS has provided custom acetabulum solutions to scores of patients over New Zealand and Australia. These solutions have improved the surgeon and patient experience and led to the successful restoration of acetabular function which would otherwise be difficult to achieve with an off-the-shelf solution.

name: Sciverse Solutions
description: At Sciverse, our name embodies our mission: to explore the boundless expanse of the Scientific Realm and harness its potential to transform healthcare. As a trailblazing MedTech company headquartered in India, we are committed to pushing the boundaries of innovation and reshaping the healthcare landscape. With a firm belief in healthcare as a fundamental human right, we strive to leverage cutting-edge technologies such as AI, microfluidics, and more to break down barriers and ensure equitable access to quality care for all. Our journey is fueled by a passion for discovery, a relentless pursuit of excellence, and a profound sense of compassion. || At Sciverse, our name embodies our mission: to explore the boundless expanse of the Scientific Realm and harness its potential to transform healthcare. As a trailblazing MedTech company headquartered in India, we are committed to pushing the boundaries of innovation and reshaping the healthcare landscape. With a firm belief in healthcare as a fundamental human right, we strive to leverage cutting-edge technologies such as AI, microfluidics, and more to break down barriers and ensure equitable access to quality care for all. Our journey is fueled by a passion for discovery, a relentless pursuit of excellence, and a profound sense of compassion. | Our next-generation portable diagnostics platform will allow real-time diagnosis at the point-of-care providing lab results in minutes, dramatically improving patient outcomes and reducing the time it takes to diagnose and treat patients. | Sciverse builds AI-first point-of-care diagnostics using microfluidics, optics, and software, and offers OEM, AI, and software services. | At Sciverse, we are reshaping the future of diagnostics by developing intelligent point-of-care testing (POCT) platforms that seamlessly integrate artificial intelligence, microfluidics, photonics, and full-stack software engineering. Our mission is simple yet bold: to bring sophisticated diagnostic capabilities directly to patients and clinicians, wherever they are. We focus on creating compact, portable diagnostic systems that enable lab-quality testing at the point of care, dramatically reducing time to diagnosis and improving patient outcomes. By combining advanced biosensors with precision microfluidics, we build highly sensitive platforms that are robust, reliable, and remarkably easy to use. Our AI-driven software—spanning computer vision pipelines for cellular analysis, cloud-connected health platforms, and mobile diagnostic applications—translates complex data into actionable clinical insights.  We also partner with medtech and biotech leaders around the world to deliver custom OEM solutions that merge specialized hardware, AI models, and regulatory-ready software into seamless, turnkey offerings.  Our portfolio includes MyCount XpressCBC, an AI-powered 5-part CBC analyzer that brings decentralized hematology testing to clinics, outreach programs, and emergency settings, and SciVision.ai, a transformative AI microscopy platform that turns any standard microscope into a smart diagnostic tool with automated image quantification and reporting.  Backed by a multidisciplinary team of engineers, scientists, and healthcare experts, we are committed to building products that exceed the highest standards of accuracy, usability, and compliance. At Sciverse, we believe the future of healthcare is decentralized, data-driven, and deeply human—and we’re building that future, one diagnostic platform at a time.

name: Sinel
description:
Our activities cover the territory of Croatia, Italy, Slovenia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Serbia, Montenegro and other countries in the region. We especially emphasize the focus on offering complete solutions. At the beginning of the business, the primary activity was the service of machine tools and devices with occasionally extensive repairs and upgrades. An advanced and quality service was developed, followed by the expansion of activities to the production of devices for controlling industrial processes. We offer complete or partial automation of production processes, modifications of production lines, development of robotic applications and robotic stations for various purposes. We cover almost all types of industries, from metalworking, shipbuilding, mechanical engineering, paper and other types of industries with special emphasis on the automotive industry. Today, the company employs about thirty employees. Our experienced team of experts consists of engineers and service technicians of industrial electronics, machine tools, mechanical engineers, mechanics and turners. Vocational education and training of various types of training with producers is continuously performed, for which we have and maintain certificates. We design, engineer, and implement intelligent automation systems that transform production efficiency across industries.

Our Core Expertise
We specialize in robotic applications for packaging, palletizing, sorting, and quality control, with deep industry knowledge in food processing and automotive manufacturing. Our solutions combine industrial robotics, machine vision inspection, and AI-powered quality control to deliver measurable improvements in speed, precision, and reliability.

What Sets Us Apart
Our team of industrial electronics engineers, robotics specialists, mechanical engineers, and certified technicians brings decades of hands-on experience. We guide our customers from initial concept through design, implementation, and ongoing support, creating automation partnerships that drive long-term success.

Industry Focus
Food Industry: Automated packaging lines, robotic palletizing systems, AI-driven quality inspection, conveyor integration
Automotive Industry: Assembly line automation, component handling, quality control systems, leak testing integration
Cross-Industry Solutions: Custom robotic stations, intralogistics automation, production line optimization


Every project is tailored to our customers' specific needs, whether they're introducing automation for the first time or optimizing existing systems. We deliver innovative and cost-effective solutions that increase productivity, enhance product quality, and reduce operational costs.

name: Machine Vision
description:
ID Ingenieure & Dienstleistungen GmbH is a company specializing in machine building and automation, offering a range of services including construction, electricity, production, technical product design, procurement, plant construction, and spare part management. Their expertise in machine vision enables them to provide in-house specialists for industrial image processing, 2D- and 3D-vision systems, and deep learning-based solutions. Their services include code reading, cosmetic defect detection, dimension measurement, robotic pick-and-place, and complete inspection. With high-performance algorithms, they can achieve frame rates of up to 1200 pieces per minute and resolutions of up to 151MP. They also offer consulting and project management for machine vision systems in automation, as well as solutions for retrofitting, robotics, and machine building. || ID Ingenieure & Dienstleistungen GmbH is a leading provider of machine building and automation services, delivering innovative solutions for construction, production, and technical product design. Die internationalen Entwicklungen im Maschinenbau zeigen, dass die bildverarbeitende Systemintegration ein entscheidender Faktor für den Wettbewerb und Erfolg in der industriellen Produktion ist. Gerade in der Fertigung sind bildverarbeitende Prozesse ein extrem wichtiger Bestandteil zur Überwachung der stetigen Qualität in Form von Messungen, Anwesenheitskontrollen, Fehlererkennung oder Unterstützung der Produktion bei Zuführprozessen mittels Roboter. „Machine Vision“ in Kombination mit Deep Learning Algorithmen automatisiert zunehmend die Prüfungs-, Zuführ- und Entscheidungsprozesse.

name: AEM
description: AEM Holdings Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides semiconductor and electronics test solutions worldwide. It operates through Test Cell Solutions, Instrumentation, Contract Manufacturing, and others segments. The company offers handling solutions comprising burn-in, system-level, wafer-level, and packaged-level tests; test hardware, software, and support services; test interface solutions consisting of manual actuators, receptacles, load board storage, docking, and custom test fixtures; engineering, rapid part prototyping, and testing services. In addition, the company manufactures and repairs semiconductor assembly and testing equipment; installs industrial machinery and equipment; manufactures automated machines and related parts for the semiconductor industry; research, develops, and integrates advance machine vision solutions; research and experimental development on electronics; manufacture and repair of engineering and scientific instruments; and designs, develops, produces, and markets electronic instrumentation devices, and physical and electrical measurement devices, as well as provides electronic engineering services. Further, it assembles printed circuit boards; design and manufactures proprietary equipment; and provides engineering services, and 3D modules for optimized thermal control applications, as well as manufactures handler change kits, tester interfaces, test handlers, thermal solutions, and other related tooling parts. Additionally, the company engages in processing and plating of parts of semiconductor components and electronic goods; production, processing, and assembly of equipment or components for connection and semiconductor components for phones and electronics; and marketing and sale of test solutions and peripheral tools/equipment for the semiconductor industry. It operates in Singapore, China, Costa Rica, Finland, France, Germany, Ireland, Malaysia, the Republic of Korea, the United Kingdom, the United States, Vietnam, and internationally. AEM Holdings Ltd. was formerly known as AEM-Evertech Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to AEM Holdings Ltd. in May 2007. AEM Holdings Ltd. was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Singapore. || AEM Holdings Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides semiconductor and electronics test solutions worldwide. name: BRÄHMIG
description:
BRÄHMIG is a company specializing in automation solutions for various industries. With over 25 years of experience, they offer customized and innovative solutions for optimizing production processes. Their services include parameter determination, feasibility studies, concept development, and simulation, among others. They provide automation solutions for industries such as special machine building, handling, and assembly processing, as well as tool clamping and sorting.

BRÄHMIG's portfolio includes machine loading, automated tool change, and process acceleration solutions. They also offer solutions for quality control, such as automated inspection and testing, as well as handling systems for safe and reliable movement of workpieces. Their expertise extends to packaging, sorting, and palletizing, and they use a wide range of technologies, including robotics.

description: About Automatic Drive-thru tire check in seconds Impressum VENTECH Systems GmbH 46284 Dorsten Germany CEO: André Weisz Company Overview VENTECH Systems GmbH with its headquarters in Dorsten, Germany, is the world market leader in the field of stationary tire inspection system. Having been distin ... guished with various innovation and business awards, VENTECH Systems continues to develop and distribute diagnostic systems for the automated inspection of tires. Quality, sound experience and high innovation as well as technological potential have made VENTECH Systems a valuable partner in this field. For almost a decade now, PNEUSCAN has been the core of it all. Developed, produced and installed locally and internationally with premium quality components manufactured with German expertise. The unique system warns about incorrect tire pressure and insufficient tread depth. Furthermore, it detects irregular tire tread wear patterns and determines axle load and vehicle gross weight. There is no necessity for any adjustment neither on the vehicle nor the tires. It can be used indoors and outdoors. Many renowned companies in various industrial fields have been relying on PNEUSCAN’s stationary tire inspection system for years, to increase profitability and safety. The system has been in use as service and maintenance application for e. g. freight forwarders, car dealers, tire dealers, service centers, public and private bus companies as well as in fleet management - whilst also being able to be integrated to meet the clients unique process requirements, simply! CAN also indicates axle load and total vehicle weight. With PNEUSCAN technology in place, annoying and time-consuming manual tire checking will become a thing of the past, as will tire related road-side breakdowns. On top, globalisation speeds up the course of action. At the same time, people and markets expect optimum quality and service - as fast as possible. To keep up, one needs perfect preconditions such as an automatic tire control system. name: Airco vullen Aalsmeer
description:
Airco vullen Aalsmeer is a company specializing in air conditioning services for classic cars. They cater to owners of vehicles produced before 1993, which use the R12 refrigerant. The company offers two options to restore the air conditioning system: retrofitting to the newer R134a refrigerant or using a replacement refrigerant, R437a, which is more cost-effective and better for the car's engine. Their service also includes a visual check of the entire air conditioning system, analysis of the system's pressure, and leak testing. || Specializing in air conditioning services for classic cars, Airco vullen Aalsmeer is dedicated to restoring the cooling systems of vehicles produced before 1993. name: AOT Solution
description:
Erfahren Sie hier alles Wissenswerte zum Thema Automation & IT bei der AOT Solution. || AOT Solution GmbH
Sehr geehrte Geschäftspartnerinnen / Geschäftspartner,
als Experten im Bereich der industriellen Bildverarbeitung entwickeln und integrieren wir für Sie seit nunmehr 15 Jahren Bildverarbeitungslösungen in höchster Qualität. Ebenfalls haben wir mit unseren Partnerfirmen der AOT-Gruppe bereits verschiedene, fachübergreifende Projekte erfolgreich realisiert.
Wir möchten uns gemeinsam weiterentwickeln und die vorhandenen Synergien der AOT Gruppe bestmöglich nutzen. Daher haben wir uns dazu entschieden, die verschiedenen Geschäftsbereiche der AOT Gruppe in der AO Systems GmbH zusammenzufassen und zu bündeln.
Auf einem gemeinsamen Weg für eine erfolgreiche Zukunft
Wir freuen uns, Ihnen mitteilen zu können, dass die AOT Solution GmbH mit der AO Systems GmbH verschmolzen worden ist und wir Ihnen ab sofort unsere Leistungen im Bereich der industriellen Bildverarbeitung als AO Systems GmbH anbieten können. Unsere Mitarbeiter und Ansprechpartner stehen Ihnen unverändert und wie gewohnt zur Verfügung.
Alles aus einer Hand
Die Fusion hat uns die Möglichkeit gegeben, unser Leistungsportfolio zu erweitern. Die AO Systems GmbH steht nun als Komplettanbieter für Ihre Automatisierungsprojekte zur Verfügung. Neben unserer Expertise in industrieller Bildverarbeitung, Automatisierungstechnik und Robotik haben wir unsere Stärken in den Bereichen der mechanischen Konstruktion, Simulation sowie dem Bau vollständiger Roboterzellen und umfassender Automatisierungslösungen weiter ausgebaut.
Die Umsetzung Ihrer Automatisierungsprojekte – das ist AO Systems
Wir möchten uns für Ihr entgegengebrachtes Vertrauen bedanken und freuen uns darauf, gemeinsam mit Ihnen auf diesem Weg in eine erfolgreiche Zukunft zu gehen. Wenn Sie mehr über unsere Dienstleistungen erfahren möchten oder individuelle Anfragen haben, zögern Sie nicht, uns zu kontaktieren. Unser Team steht Ihnen zur Verfügung.

name: Rollcar
description:
Introducing Rollshrink™ , the pinnacle of protective sleeving technology
As a startup, we are thrilled about the potential collaboration ahead. Currently equipped with looms, our immediate focus is on expanding our operations.
To establish a robust foundation, we are in the process of implementing an ERP program, incorporating a CRM module, and aligning our systems with IATF 16949 standards.
Looking ahead, we have plans to integrate AI-based machine vision and deep learning technologies for a textile material inspection system.
Our future product lineup includes the production of heat-reflective mats, knitted noise and vibration reducer sleeves, self-wrapping sleeves, and similar items and requests for similiar items are most wellcome.
We are concurrently working on a groundbreaking coating solution, designed to enhance heat reflection and provide increased fastness to friction, among other attributes. This solution is earmarked for a patent application.
In addition to our current capabilities, we are poised to invest in a cutting-edge test laboratory and R&D department. Our advisory team, comprised of industry veterans brings invaluable insights to the table. || Introducing Rollshrink™ , the pinnacle of protective sleeving technology

name: bs GRUPPE
description:
Die bs Gruppe ist Experte für das schnelle und präzise Beladen und Entladen Ihrer Produktionsmaschinen. Mit unserer Bin Picking-Zelle („Griff in die Kiste“) vereinzeln wir sogar ungeordnete Teile für Ihre Folgeprozesse.

Bestehend aus der bsAutomatisierung GmbH und der bsEngineering GmbH bietet die bs Gruppe Ihren Kunden sowohl komplette Automatisierungen und Anlagen als auch die notwendigen Engineering-Dienstleistungen, wie Roboterprogrammierung, Steuerungsprogrammierung, Elektrokonstruktion und Bildverarbeitung. Roboterzellen oder Linear-Achs-Handlings?
Ob standardisierte Roboterzellen und Linear-Achs-Handlings oder individuelle Automatisierungslösungen – mit oder ohne Bildverarbeitung – die bs Gruppe liefert die passende Automatisierungstechnik.

Komplette Automatisierungen aus einer Hand
